name: supply-chain-risk-skill
description: Analyze supply chain disruption risk for e-commerce operations. Scores supplier reliability, lead time variance, geographic concentration, and single-source dependency.
author: alphaparkinc

suppliers.description: List of supplier objects with name, country, lead_time_days, reliability_score, and category.

inventory_days.description: Current days of inventory on hand.

single_source_categories.description: Product categories sourced from a single supplier.

risk_score.description: Overall supply chain risk score 0-100 (lower is better).

risk_level.description: Risk classification: Low, Moderate, High, Critical.

risk_factors.description: Individual risk factors with scores and recommendations.

recommendations.description: Prioritized action items to reduce supply chain risk.
